title: Scarlet Singularity
description: A dark, scarlet galaxy sky overlay compatible with Optifine/Skyboxify!
body: ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2119dd13cbb2a60985f2545fb04580004f39a81f_0.webp) # Scarlet Singularity ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/scarlet-singularity?style=for-the-badge) ![Modrinth Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/scarlet-singularity?style=for-the-badge) > Built using the Optifine format, this pack features a custom sky with a stunning reddish galaxy. Whether you are traveling the world or staring at the sky, Scarlet Singularity should provide an atmosphere that captures the surreal cinematic aesthetic. > Recommended: Turn off Sun & Moon [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/M4M61V7YTQ) ### Issue? Let me know on Discord!
